heading: Compensation and appointment of employees by Senate Majority and Minority Whips
label: 6134 Compensation and appointment of employees by Senate Majority and Minority Whips
text: Effective , the Majority Whip and the Minority Whip are each authorized to appoint and fix the compensation of such employees as they deem appropriate: , That the gross compensation paid to such employees shall not exceed $111,100 each fiscal year for each Whip.April 1, 1977Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61j–2 of this titleSection is from the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1977.

Increases in CompensationIncreases in compensation for Senate officers and employees under authority of Federal Pay Comparability Act of 1970 (), see Salary Directives of President pro tempore of the Senate, set out as notes under .Pub. L. 91–656section 4571 of this title
